seo.title: What Is a Hotel Partner Channel? | Wink
seo.metaDescription: A hotel partner channel turns creators, agencies, banks and super apps into measurable, attributed hotel bookings - paid only on confirmed stays.
seo.ogTitle: What is a hotel partner channel?
seo.ogDescription: A hotel partner channel is a measurable demand path from travel creators, KOLs, agencies, communities, banks, loyalty programs, super apps, or platforms into a hotel booking flow.

cards.title: Agencies and DMCs
cards.body: Campaigns, destination programs, itineraries, group paths, and B2B recommendations.

cards.title: Event organizers
cards.body: Conference, wedding, retreat, festival, sports, and community demand with focused room or inquiry paths.

cards.title: Banks and loyalty programs
cards.body: Member offers, cardholder campaigns, private deals, and travel benefits.

cards.title: Super apps and platforms
cards.body: Embedded travel storefronts or contextual booking paths inside an existing user journey.

cards.title: Destination and media partners
cards.body: Guides, editorial lists, trip themes, and bookable recommendations.

items.question: What is a hotel Partner channel?
items.answer: It is a measurable demand path created by an external Partner such as a travel creator, KOL, agency, DMC, event organizer, community, bank, loyalty program, super app, or travel platform.

items.question: How is a Partner channel different from an OTA?
items.answer: A partner channel starts from a recommendation, audience, event, community, app, or campaign. An OTA starts from marketplace search and comparison.

items.question: Can a travel creator be a Partner channel?
items.answer: Yes, when the recommendation connects to approved hotel inventory and source attribution carries through to booking or inquiry value.

items.question: Where does Wink fit?
items.answer: Wink connects partner demand to hotel supply, bookable assets, and Booking Engine paths with a 10% default commission and 6-month attribution per click.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
